title: Inside Billion-Dollar Bedrooms & Private Jets ✨
comment_q: Bedroom or private jet — which would you take?
style: Opulent interior photography, warm golden ambient lighting, plush textures, deep rich tones with gold accents, cinematic soft focus, ultra-luxurious editorial polish

reveals.label: Sky View Suite
reveals.image: A vast bedroom with a floor-to-ceiling glass wall overlooking a nighttime city skyline, a floating platform bed, warm lamp glow, gold and cream accents

reveals.label: Round Ocean Bed
reveals.image: A dramatic circular bed in a glass bedroom suspended over a moonlit ocean, sheer canopy drapes, soft candle glow, waves visible through curved windows

reveals.image: The interior of a lavish private jet cabin with cream leather sofas, a polished wood bar, soft ambient lighting, a window revealing clouds at golden hour

title: If Life Was An RPG 🎮 Which Class Would You Main?
